rationale: A complete top-level item (int 0, 0x00) followed by a stray trailing byte (0x18) that is itself only a CBOR item *header* announcing one more length byte to follow, which never arrives. Distinguished from MULTIPLE_TOP_LEVEL_ITEMS: the tail here is not itself a complete second item.
Canonical byte string h'01' (0x4101) followed by a stray 0x18 header byte (an incomplete item, not a second complete one).
Canonical text "a" (0x6161) followed by a stray incomplete 0x18 header byte.
Canonical array [0] (0x8100) followed by a stray incomplete 0x18 header byte.
Canonical map {0:0} (0xa10000) followed by a stray incomplete 0x18 header byte.
Canonical float 2.5 (0xf94100) followed by a stray incomplete 0x18 header byte.
